ham: Hello Alex, this is a reminder from XYZ Corp HR. Your interview is scheduled for 10:00 AM on 25th Oct 2024 at our Bangalore office. Please confirm your attendance by replying YES or contact us at hr@xyzcorp.com. Thank you.
